title: Oru Pazhaya Bomb Kadha
overview: Disabled Sreekuttan and his buddy Bhavyan are a simpletons without many dreams. However, the duo will not tolerate insults and humiliation. After being disgraced by a newly-joined police officer in their village, they set out to take revenge.
